creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
New port ACH:

A software companion to a 30+ year-old CIA research methodology, Open Source
Analysis of Competing Hypotheses (ACH) will help you think objectively and
logically about overwhelming amounts of data and hypotheses. It can also guide
research teams toward more productive discussions by identifying the exact
points of contention.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
